title: pentacalia balsasana
intro: Pentacalia balsasana, also known as Balsas pentacalia or Mexican pentacalia, is a plant species in the family Asteraceae that is native to Mexico. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Pentacalia balsasana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various gastrointestinal issues. The plant's extracts can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used in herbal medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential benefits and applications.
